Q1 2026 Engineering Report

Platform reliability and performance overview

99.97%
Uptime
142ms
Avg Latency
2.4M
Requests/Day

Architecture Flow

flowchart LR
    A[Client] --> B[API Gateway]
    B --> C[Auth Service]
    B --> D[Core API]
    D --> E[Database]
    D --> F[Cache]

Service Status

Service Status Latency (p99) Error Rate
API Gateway Healthy 45ms 0.01%
Auth Service Healthy 120ms 0.03%
Core API Degraded 340ms 1.20%
Database Healthy 15ms 0.00%
Cache Layer Down N/A 100%

Key Observations

Insight

Latency improvements of 23% were observed after migrating to the new connection pool configuration.

Success

Zero-downtime deployment pipeline achieved for all production services since February.

Critical

Cache layer outage on March 15 caused a 40-minute degradation. Root cause: memory leak in eviction logic.

Warning

Database disk usage is at 78% and projected to hit 90% by end of Q2 without intervention.

Sprint Completion

62% Done
23% In Progress
15% Backlog

Key Metrics

847
Deployments this quarter
99.97%
Availability SLA met
12
Incidents (P1-P3)
34min
Avg MTTR

Incident Timeline

2026-01-12
Auto-scaling rollout complete
Kubernetes HPA enabled across all production namespaces.
2026-03-15
Cache layer outage
Redis cluster memory exhaustion caused cascading timeouts for 40 minutes.
2026-03-16
Hotfix deployed
Eviction policy patched, memory limits increased, canary alerts added.

Configuration Example

from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass
class CacheConfig:
    max_memory_mb: int = 2048
    eviction_policy: str = "allkeys-lru"
    max_connections: int = 500
    timeout_ms: int = 100

    def validate(self) -> bool:
        if self.max_memory_mb < 256:
            raise ValueError("Memory must be at least 256 MB")
        return True

Before vs After

Before (Q4 2025)

  • Manual deployments via SSH
  • No auto-scaling
  • Average MTTR: 2.1 hours
  • Uptime: 99.5%

After (Q1 2026)

  • CI/CD with automated rollbacks
  • Kubernetes HPA across all services
  • Average MTTR: 34 minutes
  • Uptime: 99.97%
